cit.quote: Charles's Wain, constellation of the Great Bear
free man of the lowest class
chosen in the sight of God
hē nolde him nānes flēames cēpan
hē cēpte symle hū hē cwēmde Gode

entry.note: Automatically created placeholder for orphan run-on entries.

cit.quote: call call out, call to, invoke
turn, bring into a certain state, convert

entry.note: Automatically created placeholder for orphan run-on entries.

cit.quote: leap of the moon in leap-year
hymn sung when offering is made
if it is inconvenient to him
send after, summon, make one's summons reach

entry.note: Automatically created placeholder for orphan run-on entries.

cit.quote: fall to pieces, be worn out
tear to pieces, break, lacerate, bite
destroy, abrogate, put an end to
